subject: [CDS] Add startup probe
commit_message:
[CDS] Add startup probe

When cds runs in cluster mode it needs longer startup time.
Also bump image tags to 1.1.4, and change defaults to disable
cluster mode and set replicas=1

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3275
Change-Id: Iec2eaeb2edf0cc2f9b29e35431d0e642e3b6d998
Signed-off-by: Jozsef Csongvai <jozsef.csongvai@bell.ca>

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/1988/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/1988/ )

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

I'd prefer to use a startup Probe (https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/configure-pod-container/configure-liveness-readiness-startup-probes/):

startupProbe:
  httpGet:
    path: /api/v1/execution-service/health-check
    port: {{ .Values.service.http.internalPort }}
  initialDelaySeconds: {{ .Values.startup.initialDelaySeconds }}
  failureThreshold: {{ .Values.startup.failureThreshold }}
  periodSeconds: {{ .Values.startup.periodSeconds }}

and set:
liveness:
  initialDelaySeconds: 5
  periodSeconds: 20
  timeoutSeconds: 20
  # necessary to disable liveness probe when setting breakpoints
  # in debugger so K8s doesn't restart unresponsive container
  enabled: true
startup:
  initialDelaySeconds: 5
  failureThreshold: 30
  periodSeconds: 10

with that, we would wait 310s for startup before killing but start "as soon as possible" (~15s) if "fast"
